title: Star Wars (2015) 51
content:
{{Top|rwm|aor|title=''Star Wars'' (2015) 51}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars 51}} {{ComicBook |image=[[File:StarWars2015-51.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars'' 51 |writer=[[Kieron Gillen]] |penciller=[[Salvador Larroca]] |inker=Salvador Larroca |letterer=[[Clayton Cowles]] |colorist=[[Guru-eFX]] |cover artist=*[[Jesus Aburtov]] *[[David Marquez]] |editor=[[Mark Paniccia]] |publisher=[[Marvel Comics]] |release date=[[July 18]], [[2018]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/69555/star_wars_2015_51|text=Star Wars (2015) #51}} |pages=23 |upc=759606081134 |timeline=[[1 ABY]]''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' dates the events of ''Star Wars'' (2015) 51 to [[1 ABY]]. |series=[[Star Wars (2015)|''Star Wars'' (2015)]] |issue=51 }} '''''Star Wars'' 51''' is the fifty-first issue of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series [[Star Wars (2015)|''Star Wars'']]. It was written by [[Kieron Gillen]], illustrated by [[Salvador Larroca]], and published by [[Marvel Comics]] on [[July 18]], [[2018]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''The MILLENNIUM FALCON – alone – versus an entire IMPERIAL FLEET. Can LEIA discover the cause of this disaster? And even if she can, is it too late?'' ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=HOPE DIES
Part II |text=Queen Trios of Shu-Torun, instrumental in outfitting the Rebellion's powerful new fleet, has betrayed her allies in the Alliance by completely sabotaging their cruisers' vital systems. Defenseless and unable to launch fighters, the hard-won rebel fleet is all but helpless against the might of Darth Vader and the Imperial Navy. Now Princess Leia hurries to find a way to save the fleet — and the very Rebellion itself — from certain destruction....}} ==Plot summary== Aboard her ship at the [[Mako-Ta system|Mako-Ta]] Base, Queen Trios attempts to flee the planet, but the rebels deny her request to leave. Leia and her team board Trios's ship, engaging in a blaster battle with Trios's soldiers. Trios escapes in an escape pod, telling Leia that she sabotaged the rebel fleet to ensure the survival of her home planet, [[Shu-Torun]]. The rebel cruisers are then left immobile and defenseless under a heavy Imperial assault. The rebels, led by [[Jan Dodonna|General Dodonna]], discover that the cruisers' bay doors can be opened by a nearby ship. A rebel shuttle is launched to attempt the task but is quickly destroyed by Imperial [[TIE Fighter 1|TIE fighters]], causing the rebels to lose hope. Just as a rebel cruiser is destroyed, the ''[[Millennium Falcon]]'' unexpectedly appears from hyperspace. Leia contacts Han Solo and explains that Trios's betrayal has left their fleet vulnerable. She tells Han that if he flies his ship at the sealed bay doors, the proximity sensors will open them, allowing the fighters to launch. Han agrees to the mission and Chewbacca mans the top turret. Darth Vader receives an update that a small rebel ship is in the area and is proving to be a difficult target. He then flies his TIE Fighter into the battle and begins to expertly target the Millennium Falcon as Chewbacca shoots down several TIE fighters. Luke Skywalker, seeing the Millennium Falcon from a nearby cruiser, knows that Han is on board. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars (2015) 51}} ===Editions=== *UPC 759606081134;
